svg.title: Kopiur Kustomize, backup, and restore flow
svg.desc: A small per-PVC manifest and shared Kustomize Component render complete Kopiur resources. At runtime the schedule snapshots Longhorn, Kopia copies data to RustFS, and restore-before-bind hydrates replacement PVCs.
